findings.location: Introduction (before ハンドラクラス名)
findings.description: The source introduction explains that this handler uses the `ResponseMessage` object returned by subsequent handlers as the basis for creating and sending a response message to the connected system. This describes the handler's role in the pipeline (downstream handlers must produce a ResponseMessage) and is not captured in any section of the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: 「後続ハンドラの処理結果である ResponseMessage オブジェクトの内容をもとに、応答電文を作成し接続先システムに返却(送信)する」
